notes: District Opportunity Score blends whichever sub-scores have available data: enrollment growth, Plant M&O spending trend, construction spending trend, and debt capacity. Housing/permit growth is tracked separately but not yet merged per-district (Census data is county-level; needs a district-to-county mapping to integrate cleanly). Bond cycle stage inferred from most recent passed bond election.
